query: SELECT pr.status, pr.currentNode, pr.progress, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pipeline_assets WHERE pipelineRunId = 150007 AND assetType = 'video_clip') as videoClips FROM pipeline_runs pr WHERE pr.id = 150007
